description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 25 (Saturday), I attended a match by ALDER Hanno at the Asu Athletic Park Hockey Field. In the opening game of the Takamado Trophy 2026 Hockey Japan League Samurai League Division 2, ALDER Hanno won decisively 2-0 against Tokyo University of Agriculture.

We are aiming for the Division 2 championship and promotion to Division 1 next season. Thank you for your continued support.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13512.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Watched ALDER Hanno Hockey Match
